title: Windows DLL Side-Loading via Suspicious Path
description: Detects execution of legitimate Windows binaries from non-standard paths, indicating potential DLL side-loading attacks where malicious DLLs are loaded alongside trusted executables.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*msiexec.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\ProgramData\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Downloads\\*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate DLL loading during software installation
